report_name: DocketWise Data Breach Exposes Sensitive Personal, Financial, and Medical Data of 143,000 People

attack_patterns.name: Valid Accounts
attack_patterns.description: A threat actor used legitimate credentials to gain access to a third-party partner's environment and source code repositories.

attack_patterns.name: Trusted Relationship
attack_patterns.description: The compromise of a third-party partner organization with a trusted relationship to DocketWise was exploited to access sensitive customer data.

attack_patterns.name: Data from Cloud Storage
attack_patterns.description: The threat actor cloned source code repositories from a third-party partner, which contained a data migration pipeline with sensitive PII, PHI, and financial data.

campaigns.name: DocketWise Supply Chain Data Breach
campaigns.description: A data breach incident investigated in October 2025 where an unauthorized actor used valid credentials to access a third-party partner's code repositories, exfiltrating sensitive data related to the DocketWise platform.

identities.name: DocketWise
identities.description: A provider of immigration and legal case management software whose customer data was exposed through the compromise of a third-party partner.

identities.name: Clients of DocketWise law firm customers
identities.description: A group of 143,000 individuals whose sensitive personal, financial, and medical data was exposed in the breach.

infrastructure.name: Third-Party Partner Code Repositories
infrastructure.description: Source code repositories belonging to a third-party partner that contained a data migration pipeline for DocketWise, which were cloned by the threat actor.

indicators.name: Anomalous Repository Archive Download via API
indicators.pattern:
title: Anomalous Repository Archive Download via API
id: 2b8c1f9a-7e4d-4b1f-8c9a-3d2e1f0b8c7d
status: experimental
description: Detects API calls to download a full repository archive, which can be an efficient data exfiltration method as seen in the DocketWise breach.
references:
  - https://www.securityweek.com/docketwise-data-breach-impacts-143000/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-25
tags:
  - attack.t1530
  - attack.collection
level: medium
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate administrative actions to backup or migrate repositories.
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri|contains: '/zipball'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects API calls to download a full repository archive, a potential data exfiltration method identified as a hunting hint in the DocketWise breach analysis.

relationships.target_name: Clients of DocketWise law firm customers

relationships.source_name: Anomalous Repository Archive Download via API
